title: NuclearCraft Neoteric
description: This is a re-creation of old but gold NuclearCraft on a modern MC version
body:
A complex nuclear engineering mod for Minecraft! Re-creation of old Nuclearcraft with new features.

Mod adds new resources (ores, ingots, dusts, plates, parts), processing machines, storage blocks (batteries, barrels, containers), radiation, tools and multiblock structures like fission and fusion reactors.
 

**Mod features:**

1. Materials and resources. Ore generation, dusts, ingots, plates, parts, food, liquids, gasses

2. Processing machines. Alloy smeltery, crushers, chemical reactors, pumps, crystalyzer....

3. Fission reactor. It works the same way how it was in original mod, but has some changes.
Reactor has 2 modes: energy and boiling. Reactor can produce new recipes as now it has irradiation chamber and irradiator.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uvaH50-2Bp0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
   
4. Radiation. Radiation contamination, spread, decay, shielding. 
Mekanism radiation compatibility. Spread, decay and shielding works in both way. So you can have 2 radiation sources at the same time or disable one of them.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zZ6is4gs1Uo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


5. Mining tools, and armor. Early game with spaxel (multi tool) and late game with QNP which has several modes: 5x5, 3x3, 3x3x3, Vein, one block
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/X_Qt41aKYl8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

6. In situ leaching. New way to mine large amount of resources. Literally x4 ingot production.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h9Qodc0WqGc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

7. Computers support. Processors and reactor supports computer methods CC Tweaked. Check wiki

8. Blocks to store and transfer items, energy, liquids. There was no barrels and chests originally, but now they here. Use multitool to change settings

9. Pretty much deep customization. Checkout config file

10. Fusion reactor
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DVwywb6PrUo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
